Safety_Constraint: Planner must not continue driving when a pedestrian or vehicle is within stopping distance
Emergency braking must be triggered when a detected pedestrian or vehicle is inside critical distance
Perception-to-braking latency must remain below a safe threshold
Planner must behave conservatively at intersections when traffic-light state is unknown
Planner must suppress emergency braking unless a credible stopping condition is present
Operator must receive salient warning information during critical situations
System must detect ODD violations and trigger safe fallback
Manual takeover must remain active until the vehicle reaches a safe state
